chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No.S-247 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Appl. In disposed of case 1.For orders on CMA 675/22 2.For orders on CMA 676/22 14-03-2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. **** None present for the petitioner. Learned AAG files compliance report and further submits that three absconders were arrested and thereafter were granted bail by the competent Court having jurisdiction; however, remaining three absconders are still at large and official respondents are trying to arrest them. With directions to official respondents to take hectic efforts for the arrest of remaining absconders, the listed applications are disposed of. JUDGE Ahmad
